name: Morphous Oyster Mushroom
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system to be coded from the Oyster Mushroom light and dark design-system boards: shell-grey fans, ivory gills, bark-brown structure, soft shadow, and quiet documentation surfaces. The light and dark boards are the reference for coding any future theme.
typography: Geist for quiet documentation UI with Noto Sans guidance for multilingual reading, references, and compact tables.
layout: Precise 8px documentation grids, fan-gill dividers, soft shell panels, bark sidebars, and low-noise information hierarchy.
